violations.text: The door on the hot hold unit located in the kitchen was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/28/2025

The cutting board in the kitchen is very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025
Establishment has a serve safe not registered with Rhode Island Department of Health. Application given to Person In charge. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2024

The presence of insects is not controlled as evidenced by dead roaches. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Per person in charge pest control is active 4X a year. PCC was call during time of the inspection for new assessment. pest control company arrive at the time of the inspection. Service visits increase 1Xmonth. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2024
Refrigerator 3 door reach-in gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the 3-door reach-in unit have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2024

The floor in the kitchen, under refrigerator units, around 3 bay sink and grease trap area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris and dead insects (roaches). The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2024
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2024
Establishment has a serve safe not registered with Rhode Island Department of Health. Application given to Person In charge. New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2023

The condensate from the 3-door reach-in refrigeration unit is draining a the bottom of the unit. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Service must be call. New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2023

The floor under shelves, 3 bay sink, grease trap area has an accumulation of soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2023

The double doors to the outside, located in the cafeteria, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2023

Beef patties were observed held between 107-127 degrees Fahrenheit. at the hot hold warmer. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items were reheated at the time of the inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/10/2023
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2023
